zh.Auchterarder, Perth, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭培爾奧特拉德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Margaret Montefichet於1330年出生在蘇格蘭培爾卡吉爾時，她的父親William de Montifex Baron of Cargill25歲，母親Mary De Monteith35歲。她於大約1345年與John Drummond在蘇格蘭培爾卡吉爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1375年1月31日在英國蘇格蘭培爾培斯享年45歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭培爾卡吉爾。

zh-hans.Auchterarder, Perth, Scotland: 英国苏格兰培爾奧特拉德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Margaret Montefichet于1330年出生在苏格兰培爾卡吉爾时，她的父亲William de Montifex Baron of Cargill25岁，母亲Mary De Monteith35岁。她于大约1345年与John Drummond在苏格兰培爾卡吉爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1375年1月31日在英国苏格兰培爾培斯享年45岁，埋葬在苏格兰培爾卡吉爾。

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Margaret Montefichet was born in 1330, in Cargill, Perthshire, Scotland, her father, William de Montifex Baron of Cargill, was 25 and her mother, Mary De Monteith, was 35. She married John Drummond about 1345, in Cargill, Perthshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 31 January 1375, in Perth, Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 45, and was buried in Cargill, Perthshire, Scotland.

fr.Firth Muir of Boysack, Angus, Scotland,: Firth Muir of Boysack, Angus, Écosse, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Margaret Montefichet est née en 1330, à Cargill, Perthshire, Écosse, son père, William de Montifex Baron of Cargill, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Mary De Monteith, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé John Drummond environ 1345, à Cargill, Perthshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 31 janvier 1375, à Perth, Perthshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterrée à Cargill, Perthshire, Écosse.

de.Firth Muir of Boysack, Angus, Scotland,: Firth Muir of Boysack, Angus, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Margaret Montefichet 1330 in Cargill, Perthshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Montifex Baron of Cargill 25 und ihre Mutter Mary De Monteith 35. Sie hat um 1345 in Cargill, Perthshire, Scotland John Drummond geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 31. Januar 1375 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Perth, Perthshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Cargill, Perthshire, Scotland begraben.

Lei sposato John Drummond circa 1345, nel Cargill, Perthshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 31 gennaio 1375, nel Perth, Perthshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 45 anni, e fu sepolta a Cargill, Perthshire, Scotland.

ko.Firth Muir of Boysack, Angus, Scotland,: 영국 스코틀랜드 앤구스 피르스 무이르 프 보이사크
ko.lifeSummary: Mary Margaret Montefichet(이)가 1330년 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 카르길에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Montifex Baron of Cargill(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary De Monteith(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 대략 1345년 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 카르길에서 John Drummond(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1375년 1월 31일 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르 퍼스에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 카르길에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Margaret Montefichet nasceu em 1330, em Cargill, Perthshire, Scotland, seu pai, William de Montifex Baron of Cargill, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Mary De Monteith, tinha 35 anos. Ela casou-se com John Drummond aproximadamente 1345, em Cargill, Perthshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 31 de janeiro de 1375, em Perth, Perthshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 45 anos, e foi sepultada em Cargill, Perthshire, Scotland.

ru.Firth Muir of Boysack, Angus, Scotland,: фирт муир оф боисакк, ангус, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Margaret Montefichet родилась в 1330 г. в местности каргилл, пиртшир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени William de Montifex Baron of Cargill было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary De Monteith, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Drummond около 1345 г. в местности каргилл, пиртшир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла 31 января 1375 г. в местности пирт, пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 45 лет и была похоронена в местности каргилл, пиртшир, Шотландия.

Se casó con John Drummond aproximadamente 1345, en Cargill, Perthshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 31 de enero de 1375, en Perth, Perthshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 45 años, y fue sepultada en Cargill, Perthshire, Scotland.
